perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with bright pink hair and a white top stands in front of a golden temple wall, smiling and speaking directly to the camera. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a red and white informative board explaining the rules of the divination ritual. (3) Participant 1, a woman in a white jacket and grey top, is shown kneeling and throwing a tray of colorful divination blocks onto a large Yin-Yang mat. (4) An older male staff member in a yellow vest uses a red pointer to identify the results of the blocks. (5) Participant 2, wearing a purple cap and white shirt, and Participant 3, the pink-haired woman, both take turns kneeling and throwing the blocks. (6) The pink-haired woman is seen looking disappointed, bowing her head against the mat. (7) She is then seen writing on a whiteboard and subsequently holding a red paper 'check' over an incense burner as part of the ritual conclusion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched female voice introduces a 'PK' challenge with an energetic and humorous tone. (2) Sound effects (SFX) like bells and digital 'dings' punctuate the appearance of on-screen titles. (3) The clattering sound of multiple wooden divination blocks hitting the floor is heard clearly. (4) A mature male voice counts the results in a rhythmic manner. (5) Frequent laughter and loud exclamations from multiple women are heard as they react to the ritual results. (6) A brief, slightly slower, comical BGM plays when a 'failure' result is discussed. (7) The video ends with the main female voice inviting viewers to visit the temple over the continuous upbeat music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text provides full Mandarin subtitles for the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative hook text includes: '擲杯圓夢!! 歡喜圓夢計畫!!' (Divination Dreams! Joyful Dream Project!!) in a stylized font. (3) Participant introductions: '1號選手 麻希!', '2號選手 阿民!', '3號選手 阿樂!' appear with flag icons. (4) Humorous captions like '智慧夠了 所以不用' (Enough wisdom so not needed) and '我們三個怎麼了...' (What happened to the three of us...) with emotional stickers. (5) Closing text: '嘉義歡喜財神廟' (Chiayi Joyful Fortune Temple) with a decorative illustration.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game participation by three individuals -> Result analysis -> Ritual completion/Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 pink-haired creator, 3 female participants, 1 male temple worker, and 2 background passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with vibrant pink hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a black choker.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior and exterior of a Buddhist/Taoist temple featuring golden walls, traditional red pillars, a large Yin-Yang divination mat, and an incense burner.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight mixed with indoor ambient lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Demo -> Individual Trials -> Result Analysis -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an entertaining travel and culture vlog promoting the Chiayi Joyful Fortune Temple. By framing the traditional divination ritual as a 'PK' challenge between friends, it makes a religious practice appear accessible, fun, and trendy to a younger audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions the temple name, shows its location, explains its unique ritual, and encourages visitors to come.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style editing with heavy use of kinetic typography and sound effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-energy 'influencer' style typical of short-form social media content in Taiwan to bridge traditional culture with modern entertainment.
